pageContext.name: Scott Pilgrim vs The World
pageContext.description: 'Hi, I was thinking about asking you out but then I realized how stupid that would be. So do you wanna go out sometime?'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the Scott Pilgrim vs The World Fine Art Lithograph Print by George Bletsis!  This 24 x 36 unframed Lithograph print has an edition size of 300 and comes with a stamp of authenticity on the reverse. Printed on Absolute Naturalis 270gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of comics and Scott Pilgrim vs The World!
